items.title: Bucks are still $33.2M under the luxury tax with an estimate plugged in for Ousmane Dieng.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Bucks are still $33.2M under the luxury tax with an estimate plugged in for Ousmane Dieng.

Roster spots are a bigger issue than spending power for Milwaukee right now, factoring in the trade with the Heat.

items.title: Ousmane Dieng signs three-year deal with Bucks
items.author: Yahoo Sports
items.body_excerpt: Ousmane Dieng signs three-year deal with Bucks Yahoo Sports

items.title: Sources: Ousmane Dieng and the Milwaukee Bucks have agreed to a 3-year, $17.5 million deal, including a team option Year 3. Agent Michael Tellem and Marius Rutkauskas of Excel Sports Management did the deal. ESPN was first to report an agreement. HoopsHype first on a team option.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Sources: Ousmane Dieng and the Milwaukee Bucks have agreed to a 3-year, $17.5 million deal, including a team option Year 3. Agent Michael Tellem and Marius Rutkauskas of Excel Sports Management did the deal. ESPN was first to report an agreement. HoopsHype first on a team option.

items.title: Ousmane Dieng: Becomes free agent
items.author: CBS Sports
items.body_excerpt: Ousmane Dieng: Becomes free agent CBS Sports

items.title: Sources: The Milwaukee Bucks declined to tender Ousmane Dieng a qualifying offer, which will make him an unrestricted free agent. Bucks have significant interest in re-signing Dieng in free agency. He averaged 11.0 points, 4.6 rebounds and 3.6 assists last season for Milwaukee.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Sources: The Milwaukee Bucks declined to tender Ousmane Dieng a qualifying offer, which will make him an unrestricted free agent. Bucks have significant interest in re-signing Dieng in free agency. He averaged 11.0 points, 4.6 rebounds and 3.6 assists last season for Milwaukee.
